phoneticUs: 藞steri蓹藢v瑟蕭蓹n; 藞st瑟蓹ri蓹藢v瑟蕭蓹n
examples: A suitable stereovision system was set up for this research.
The traffic accident scene investigation system based on binocular stereovision is designed.
A method of remanufacturing workpieces measurement and reconstruction based on structured light stereovision is proposed.
The next generation of 3-D will go beyond stereovision tricks and into the realm of holography.
